changelog: fix: show previous slide to participants when PowerPoint is presenting fullscreen
fix: update LaunchAgent plist to use conductor workspace path
Fix participant slides availability when daemon is online
fix: use emoji PNG icon, grays out on unfocused monitors
fix: re-fetch catalog on slides_updated so available_on_server updates in real time
fix: load secrets from ~/.training-assistants-secrets.env, add template icon
fix: disable unavailable slides (no click, no download button)
fix: X close button red background with white icon
feat: show daemon connection status indicator in participant view
feat: remove top-right X, red X in bottom-left, emoji-style +/- and page badge
fix: cross out unavailable slide titles in participant list
fix: page badge as pill shape instead of circle
fix: debounce Ctrl+wheel zoom and restore scroll position after re-render
feat: move slides controls to bottom-left, reorder X-minus-plus-page, round page bubble
fix: overlay exits when parent start.sh dies (ppid monitoring)
fix: make 'Try download' a real link when PDF.js fails to load
feat: restyle slides overlay controls as round accent bubbles with close button
feat: remember button bar position per monitor layout
fix: remove 'Slides will appear here when published' placeholder bubble
fix: remove + separator between host dot and participant count in top bar
